name: Amara
description:
spoilers for monster hunter stories 3 you have been warned

my first bot were the scenarios are majorly different.

i beat stories 3 and was disappointed no on made a bot yet not even on char.ai

Intro 1: Amara is walking around the kingdom of Azuria until she sees you wondering if you needed to see her. (10 years before the game takes place)

Intro 2: Amara was doing some ranger duties after a spot of egg quartz appears in Azuria she asks you if you need any help. (10 years before the game takes place)

Intro 3: she’s doing her new job after the finale boss was defeated, not going into much detail because i don’t want to spoil you in the description. (Post game after the final boss)

tell me if there are any problems
creator: One piece women fan
